title: Crevice Cleaning Brushes, Scrub Brush for Hard to Reach Small Space, Home Essentials, Cleaning Supplies, Cleaning Tools for Household Use, Bathroom, Shower, Kitchen, Window (2, Black)
features: Quality Materials: Cleangor small cleaning brushes are made of sturdy plastic and alloy structure, PP handle, not easy to bend, Serrated hard bristles, not easy to deform and fall off, durable and sustainable.
Ergonomic Design: Non-slip ergonomic design handle, easy to grip, comfortable and labor-saving, protecting our hands. Crevice cleaning tool help you clean hard-to-reach awkward places.

Efficient Cleaning: Narrow head and front curved design, can easily enter gaps, cracks, corners and hard-to-reach areas, thick and long bristles can effectively remove dust, debris and dirt in small spaces.
Convenient Size: Tiny crevice brush is small and portable, easy to store and transport. Suitable for home use and travel. Small cleaning brushes work for difficult places to reach.
Easy Storage: The handle of long thin cleaning brushes has a small hole for easy hanging to dry and storage, saving space.

Multi-purpose Brush: Our cleaning brush is suitable for cleaning various surfaces such as sinks, window tracks, blinds, door tracks, faucets, cars, stoves, grout lines, basins, floors, keyboards, bathtubs, vents, drains, swimming pools, vehicles, furniture, boats, countertops, microwaves, coffee machines, shower door frames, fans, shoes, sneakers, ovens, washing machines, toilet tank floors, the seam between the toilet bottom and toilet lid, the gaps in carved furniture, outdoor brick seams, etc.
